name: alpha-radar-openclaw-skill
description: OpenClaw custom skill that renders Binance research data into TG previews, full reports, token cards, help cards, or Binance Square drafts.

scripts.help: node scripts/render-report.js --input examples/sample-data.json --style tg --command "帮助" --output examples/sample-help.txt
scripts.smoke: node scripts/render-report.js --input examples/sample-data.json --style tg --output .tmp-check-tg.txt && node scripts/render-report.js --input examples/sample-data.json --style report --output .tmp-check-report.md && node scripts/render-report.js --input examples/sample-data.json --style square --output .tmp-check-square.txt && node scripts/render-report.js --input examples/sample-data.json --style tg --command "帮助" --output .tmp-check-help.txt && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.tmp-check-tg.txt',{force:true});require('fs').rmSync('.tmp-check-report.md',{force:true});require('fs').rmSync('.tmp-check-square.txt',{force:true});require('fs').rmSync('.tmp-check-help.txt',{force:true});"
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run smoke
